raw_text:
verdict=ESCALATE
reason=SRC-001 is only observe_prod, while SRC-003 requires deploy_prod plus an approved change ticket and rollback_owner=assigned; although SRC-002 and SRC-003 cover the ticket/rollback conditions, there is no deploy_prod approval record for SA-5105/SVC-5105.
